① Signal
Signal
Play the over 3.5.2 units
High-confidence edge — 71% model conviction at 5.3K vs 3.5 line.
May sits below league average on whiff rate (21.7% vs 25% LG) — he needs a favorable matchup and his best command to push Ks. MIL is a genuine mismatch tonight — this lineup whiffs on curveball at 30.4%, well above league average, and curveball is his best weapon. Model projects 5.3K vs 3.5 (+1.8K) but he's cooled off lately (adj L10 5.59K) — the edge is real but size accordingly.
Bet wins if
✓SW converts two-strike counts (26% putaway rate) — batters can't put it in play late
Bet loses if
✗He averages only 5.4 IP — short outings cap K upside hard
✗High variance (σ2.9K) — his floor is well below projection

Play the over 5.5.2 units
High-confidence edge — 71% model conviction at 7.6K vs 5.5 line.
Schlittler is above average at inducing swings and misses (27.9% WHF) and his curveball is a legitimate putaway pitch (33%) — he has both the means to generate Ks. The matchup sets up well — curveball is his top pitch and TB is vulnerable to it (ELITE match score). MIX-K of 20.1% vs his specific arsenal ranks #3/30. Model has him at 7.6K vs a 5.5 line (+2.1K) and recent form backs it up — L10 adj 7.18K, trending up.
⚠ Best value at the 5.5 alt line vs the 6.5 market main — be on the right number.
Bet wins if
✓SI converts two-strike counts (33% putaway rate) — batters can't put it in play late
✓Sharp command (1.8 BB/9) — every PA counts and he's not giving away bases
Bet loses if
✗He averages only 5.7 IP — short outings cap K upside hard
✗High variance (σ2.6K) — his floor is well below projection

① Signal
Signal
Play the over 6.5.2 units
High-confidence edge — 66% model conviction at 8.2K vs 6.5 line.
Sánchez has genuine swing-and-miss stuff (31.4% WHF) and converts deep counts with his slider (37% putaway) — once batters fall behind, they're in trouble. The matchup sets up well — slider is his top pitch and KC is vulnerable to it (ELITE match score). MIX-K of 21.2% vs his specific arsenal ranks #8/30. Model has 8.2K vs 6.5 (+1.7K) but variance is real (σ2.7K) — the edge exists, the floor exists too.
Bet wins if
✓He logs his average 6.9 IP — enough PA to let Ks accumulate
✓SL converts two-strike counts (37% putaway rate) — batters can't put it in play late
✓Sharp command (1.8 BB/9) — every PA counts and he's not giving away bases
Bet loses if
✗High variance (σ2.7K) — his floor is well below projection

Over 4.5 is the play.1.5 units
Solid over edge at 5.8K vs 4.5. 66% CAP — standalone play, not a parlay filler.
Gausman is above average at inducing swings and misses (28.1% WHF) and his slider is a legitimate putaway pitch (33%) — he has both the means to generate Ks. The matchup sets up well — slider is his top pitch and SF is vulnerable to it (ELITE match score). MIX-K of 21.0% vs his specific arsenal ranks #2/30. Model projects 5.8K vs 4.5 (+1.3K) but he's cooled off lately (adj L10 5.74K) — the edge is real but size accordingly.
⚠ Best value at the 4.5 alt line vs the 5.5 market main — be on the right number.

✓SL converts two-strike counts (33% putaway rate) — batters can't put it in play late

① Signal
Signal
Over 3.5 is the play.1 unit
Solid over edge at 4.2K vs 3.5. 59% CAP — standalone play, not a parlay filler.
Freeland is a league-average swing-and-miss pitcher (22.1% WHF) — he's not blowing batters away, so command and sequencing matter more than pure stuff tonight. The matchup sets up well — sweeper is his top pitch and LAD is vulnerable to it (ELITE match score). MIX-K of 21.7% vs his specific arsenal ranks #7/30. Model has him at 4.2K vs a 3.5 line (+0.7K) and recent form backs it up — L10 adj 4.31K, trending up.
⚠ Best value at the 3.5 alt line vs the 4.5 market main — be on the right number.
Bet wins if
✓CU converts two-strike counts (26% putaway rate) — batters can't put it in play late
✓Sharp command (2.1 BB/9) — every PA counts and he's not giving away bases
Bet loses if
✗He averages only 5.2 IP — short outings cap K upside hard

① Signal
Signal
Over 4.5 is the play.1 unit
Solid over edge at 5.2K vs 4.5. 58% CAP — standalone play, not a parlay filler.
Jax has genuine swing-and-miss stuff (30.7% WHF) and converts deep counts with his changeup (36% putaway) — once batters fall behind, they're in trouble. NYY is a genuine mismatch tonight — this lineup whiffs on changeup at 30.9%, well above league average, and changeup is his best weapon. Model projects 5.2K vs a 4.5 line (+0.7K), L10 adj 4.31K. Edge is clear at current pricing.
⚠ Best value at the 4.5 alt line vs the 5.5 market main — be on the right number.
Bet wins if
✓CH converts two-strike counts (36% putaway rate) — batters can't put it in play late
✓Elite swing-and-miss stuff (30.7% WHF) — Ks can stack quickly when he's on
Bet loses if
✗He averages only 4.6 IP — short outings cap K upside hard

Lean over 3.5 — size down.0.5 unit
Marginal over edge (4.1K vs 3.5), 57% conviction — take it reduced.
Drohan is above average at inducing swings and misses (28.5% WHF) and his slider is a legitimate putaway pitch (34%) — he has both the means to generate Ks. The matchup sets up well — slider is his top pitch and STL is vulnerable to it (ELITE match score). MIX-K of 19.1% vs his specific arsenal ranks #2/30. Model projects 4.1K vs a 3.5 line (+0.6K), L10 adj 4.48K. Edge is clear at current pricing.
⚠ Best value at the 3.5 alt line vs the 4.5 market main — be on the right number.

✓SL converts two-strike counts (34% putaway rate) — batters can't put it in play late
Bet loses if
✗He averages only 4.7 IP — short outings cap K upside hard

① Signal
Signal
Lean over 4.5 — size down.0.5 unit
Marginal over edge (5.1K vs 4.5), 56% conviction — take it reduced.
Cameron is a league-average swing-and-miss pitcher (24.3% WHF) — he's not blowing batters away, so command and sequencing matter more than pure stuff tonight. PHI is a genuine mismatch tonight — this lineup whiffs on changeup at 29.7%, well above league average, and changeup is his best weapon. Model projects 5.1K vs 4.5 (+0.6K) but he's cooled off lately (adj L10 4.93K) — the edge is real but size accordingly.
⚠ Best value at the 4.5 alt line vs the 5.5 market main — be on the right number.
Bet wins if
✓CU converts two-strike counts (29% putaway rate) — batters can't put it in play late
Bet loses if
✗He averages only 5.2 IP — short outings cap K upside hard
✗High variance (σ2.6K) — his floor is well below projection

Model projects 3.8K vs 3.5 — edge too thin to take a side.
Burrows is a league-average swing-and-miss pitcher (23.2% WHF) — he's not blowing batters away, so command and sequencing matter more than pure stuff tonight. The matchup sets up well — changeup is his top pitch and WSH is vulnerable to it (ELITE match score). MIX-K of 20.4% vs his specific arsenal ranks #8/30. Model lands at 3.8K vs 3.5 (+0.3K) — projection is reliable here (σ1.3K), not driven by one outlier start.
Bet wins if
✓SL converts two-strike counts (27% putaway rate) — batters can't put it in play late
✓Consistent output (σ1.3K) — model projection is reliable, not driven by one outlier
Bet loses if
✗He averages only 5.8 IP — short outings cap K upside hard

Model projects 3.8K vs 3.5 — edge too thin to take a side.
Pfaadt is a league-average swing-and-miss pitcher (24.5% WHF) — he's not blowing batters away, so command and sequencing matter more than pure stuff tonight. SD is a genuine mismatch tonight — this lineup whiffs on curveball at 33.7%, well above league average, and curveball is his best weapon. Model projects 3.8K vs a 3.5 line (+0.3K), L10 adj 3.3K. Edge is clear at current pricing.
Bet wins if
✓CU converts two-strike counts (29% putaway rate) — batters can't put it in play late
Bet loses if
✗He averages only 5.5 IP — short outings cap K upside hard

MODEL
signals · methodology · card guide · v9.9
Performance Tracker
through 2026-07-06

Live results by signal tier — updated each session. ROI uses actual FD odds. Bias = avg(actual − projected Ks), positive means model over-projects. MAE = mean absolute projection error in Ks.

■ Win rate bar fills to actual %▲ Bias positive = model tends to over-project Ks◆ MAE in strikeouts — lower is better● Bias within range
Signal Tiers — What Each Badge Means
STRONG · 2uHighest conviction. Model projects meaningfully more Ks than the line with strong probability and high confidence across multiple signals. Recommended 2 unit bet.
MOD · 1uModerate conviction. Clear edge vs the line with reasonable confidence. Standard 1 unit bet (1.5u when confidence is elevated and variance is low).
LEAN O · 0.5uDirectional lean over. Model sees an edge but confidence or probability does not clear the full action threshold. Half unit only.
LEAN U · 0.5uDirectional lean under. Model projects below the line with some confidence but not enough for full conviction. Half unit only.
UNDER · 1uHigh conviction fade. Model projects meaningfully fewer Ks than the line with strong confidence. 1 unit bet (1.5u when confidence is highest).
WATCH ⇑⇓Signal exists but does not clear the action threshold — confidence too low or variance too high. No bet recommended. Orange = over direction, Silver = under. Blocker reason shown on the card.
PASSNo meaningful signal. Model projects close to the line or insufficient data to form a view.
CAP — Model Confidence

CAP (0-100%) measures how aligned the signals are — not a win probability. High CAP means multiple independent signals point the same direction. Used to gate tier assignment — higher tiers require higher CAP.

Reading a Card
PROJ strip — model projection, edge vs line, P(over), CAP confidence
L10 form bar — last 10 starts coloured by above/below projection
Arsenal panel — pitch mix with whiff% and putaway%. P·WHF = pitcher whiff rate. OPP·WHF = lineup average whiff rate vs that pitch
Lineup panel — confirmed batting order with per-batter K% and whiff%. Green = pitcher advantage, Red = batter advantage
OPP K-MIX strip — BBRef season team K% vs MIX-K% weighted by this pitcher's specific pitch mix
Implied Odds box — probability of clearing each alt line as American odds. BET = recommended line, MKT = market main
Signal strip — action summary, unit size, key reason for signal
Data Sources
Live each session — pitcher L10 K counts, IP, ERA · FanDuel alt lines and odds · confirmed lineups
Savant CSV — batter K%/whiff%/xBA per pitch type · pitcher arsenal whiff%/FPS%/putaway%
Researched — team wRC+ by handedness · L10 runs/game · park factors · bullpen ERA · BBRef team K% splits
Not included — live Statcast splits · bullpen usage · real-time injury status beyond confirmed lineup
Hits TabBETA

P(≥1 hit) for each batter tonight. Built from confirmed lineups and pitcher arsenal data. Sorted by edge vs FanDuel's posted hit line. Early stage — no bullpen data or recent trends. Large edges often reflect model limitations, not market errors.

⚠ For informational and entertainment purposes only. Projections are model outputs — not guarantees. Past performance does not guarantee future results. Bet responsibly.

↑
